settings.title: Intelligence Settings
settings.subtitle: Learning levels, tenant isolation, and privacy principles.

internal.title: Level 1 — Internal Learning
internal.description: Aipify Group AS operational data. Full learning allowed. Highest trust. Never shared externally without approval.

pilot.title: Level 2 — Pilot Learning
pilot.description: Unonight production validation. Operational metadata only. Requires admin approval before becoming global.

customer.title: Level 3 — Customer Learning
customer.description: External customer operational patterns. Strict tenant isolation. No conversations, identities, or documents stored.

global.title: Level 4 — Global Intelligence
global.description: Approved anonymised patterns that improve every installation across the ecosystem.

tenantIsolation.title: Tenant isolation model
tenantIsolation.description: Internal patterns stay internal. Pilot patterns stay with Unonight. Customer patterns remain customer-specific. Only approved global patterns are shared ecosystem-wide.

publicTrust.title: How Aipify learns safely
publicTrust.description: Aipify learns from operational metadata, not private customer content. Conversations, invoices, identities, uploaded files, and payment details are never used for shared learning. Only approved and anonymised operational patterns may improve the global Aipify system.

paymentOperations.title: Payment Operations Center
paymentOperations.subtitle: Complete visibility and control over Aipify's global payment infrastructure.
paymentOperations.principle: Aipify should never depend on a single payment provider. The platform must remain resilient through provider diversity.
paymentOperations.foundingPrinciple: Payment infrastructure is not only about collecting money. It is about removing friction, increasing trust, and enabling global growth. Aipify Group AS. From Norway. For the world.

executive.criticalProvidersDegraded: One or more critical providers require attention.

settlements.empty: No settlement records in this category.

recommendations.settlementDelay: Review settlement batch and confirm provider payout schedule.
recommendations.webhookInterruption: Verify webhook endpoint health and replay failed events if needed.
recommendations.providerOutage: Confirm provider status page and enable failover routing if required.
recommendations.securityIncident: Review trust audit logs and confirm credential rotation status.
recommendations.operationalUpdate: No action required — monitor provider status.
recommendations.reviewRecommended: Review when convenient — no immediate customer impact expected.

audit.empty: No payment operations audit entries yet.

releaseCenter.principle: Kunder ska aldrig undra vad som ändrats. Transparens bygger förtroende. Kommunikation minskar osäkerhet.

complianceGovernanceCenter.subtitle: Synlighet och kontroll över compliance-aktiviteter, governance-inställningar, godkännanden och policygenomdrivning.
complianceGovernanceCenter.principle: Förtroende byggs genom ansvar. Governance ska möjliggöra ansvarsfull tillväxt, inte onödig komplexitet.

decisionCenter.title: Decision Center
decisionCenter.subtitle: Aipify-rekommendationer för ledning, administratörer och kundframgångsteam baserat på operativ data och plattformsinsikter.
decisionCenter.principle: Information ensam räcker inte. Det sanna värdet av intelligens ligger i att hjälpa människor fatta bättre beslut vid rätt tillfälle.

playbookCenter.title: Playbook Center
playbookCenter.subtitle: Skapa återanvändbara operativa playbooks och automatiseringar som standardiserar återkommande affärsprocesser.
playbookCenter.principle: De bästa organisationerna förlitar sig inte bara på minnet. De bygger repeterbara system som hjälper människor prestera konsekvent och tryggt.

executiveOperationsCenter.principle: Chefer ska förstå organisationens tillstånd inom 60 sekunder efter inloggning.

revenueOperations.title: Revenue Operations

revenueOperations.principle: Customers should receive immediate value after purchase. Payment should trigger progress.

external.title: Aipify does not calculate taxes or perform VAT reporting.

testingPage.title: Business Pack Testing Center
testingPage.subtitle: Testa behörigheter, arbetsflöden, Companion, mobil och simulering.

aosCore.title: AOS Core Center
aosCore.subtitle: Central plattformguvernör som koordinerar motorer, orkestrering, beroenden, feature flags, hälsa, styrning och körning i hela Aipify.
aosCore.principle: Varje motor fungerar självständigt. Varje motor fungerar tillsammans. Aipify beter sig som en plattform — inte frånkopplade moduler.

enginesPage.title: Motorregister
enginesPage.subtitle: Centralt register över alla plattformsmotorer — status, beroenden, hälsa och Business Pack-användning.

featuresPage.title: Feature Flag Engine
featuresPage.subtitle: Gradvis utrullning för dashboards, Companion-färdigheter, marketplace och enterprise-funktioner.

companionPersonality.title: Companion Personality Center
companionPersonality.subtitle: Plattformsstyrning för Companion-personlighet, adaptiv kommunikation, relationsmodeller, förtroende och människocentrerad interaktion — en Companion överallt.
companionPersonality.principle: Människor bygger relationer med personligheter — inte gränssnitt. En Companion. En personlighet. Ett relationsramverk.

verifiedProviders.title: Verifierat leverantörsregister
verifiedProviders.subtitle: Plattformsstyrning för det verifierade leverantörsnätverket — identitet, verifiering, tjänster, kontrakt och prestanda.
verifiedProviders.principle: Endast verifierade leverantörer får betrodd status. Companion koordinerar — plattformen styr.

developerEcosystem.title: Developer Portal
developerEcosystem.subtitle: Dokumentation, API:er, SDK:er, testning, publicering och analys för Companion extension-ekosystemet.
developerEcosystem.principle: Aipify tillhandahåller plattformen. Ekosystemet tillhandahåller innovation.

seoDashboard.title: SEO & Organic Discovery
seoDashboard.subtitle: Track public knowledge authority, content inventory, and organic growth foundations.
seoDashboard.authorityRule: Every article must help visitors understand, learn, improve, decide, and trust. Never publish content solely for search engines.

organicTraffic.label: Organic traffic
organicTraffic.note: Wire to analytics provider for live sessions and landing page trends.

pagePerformance.label: Page performance
pagePerformance.note: Core Web Vitals and top landing pages — connect Search Console when approved.

knowledgeViews.label: Knowledge article views
knowledgeViews.note: Article inventory count shown until view telemetry is connected.

businessPackViews.label: Business Pack page views
businessPackViews.note: Pack landing page inventory — connect conversion tracking for live data.

growthPartnerConversions.label: Growth Partner conversions from organic
growthPartnerConversions.note: Attribution from knowledge content to /growth-partners applications.

searchRankings.label: Search rankings
searchRankings.note: Track category terms: Business Operating System, Operational Visibility, Companion Platform.

websiteIntelligence.title: Website Intelligence Center
websiteIntelligence.subtitle: Measure what works, where visitors leave, and where they convert — evidence-based website growth.
websiteIntelligence.empty: Website intelligence is not available yet.
websiteIntelligence.privacyNote: Aggregates only — marketing events store metadata, not customer PII or conversation content.
websiteIntelligence.optimizationRule: Never redesign based on opinions alone. Use data, behavior, conversions, engagement, and feedback.

heatmap.title: Heatmap architecture
heatmap.privacyNote: Heatmap providers must respect Aipify privacy standards — no keystroke or PII capture.

websiteGovernance.title: Website Governance Center
websiteGovernance.subtitle: Brand, design, and public website quality — the digital headquarters foundation for Aipify Group AS.
websiteGovernance.rules: All future public pages follow approved messaging, colors, typography, terminology, and CTA structure.
websiteGovernance.principles: Educate · Build trust · Generate demand · Support customers, partners, and growth.
websiteGovernance.transitionNote: After website foundation completion, primary development focus returns to platform, Companion, Business Packs, and customer experience.
